headline: Is Darden Restaurants Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: While Darden Restaurants has underperformed the Dow Jones Industrial Average over the past year, analysts remain moderately bullish on its long-term outlook.

raw.headline: Is Darden Restaurants Stock Underperforming the Dow?

headline: CarMax (KMX) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: CarMax (KMX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +39.61% and +5.43%, respectively, for the quarter ended May 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
